name: Reindeer Bottle Opener - Threshold™
description:
Make a whimsical statement in your bar area with this Reindeer Bottle Opener from Threshold™. This bottle opener is designed as a reindeer in a gold-tone hue to bring a touch of holiday joy to your barware. Made of metal, the bottle opener is easy to use and instantly elevates your drinking experience.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
